params._secsPerYear: secs in a year, default value = 31556952 * 1e18

params.borrows: balance of underlying assets borrowed from the pool
params.liquidity: total balance of the underlying asset in the pool

getBorrowRatePerSecond(uint256,uint256).notice: Calculates Borrow rate per second Borrow Rate Per Second = c3 * (util * c1 + util^32 * c1 + util^64 * c2) / secsPerYear where util = borrows / (liquidity + borrows)
